None of Above Accidents CHAR 1 Health conditions: accidents - none of above. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
373 J5A J5A_UNSTABLE_COND (J5A) Conditions/Disease Make Residents Mood/Behavior Unstable CHAR 1 Health conditions: stability of conditions - conditions/diseases lead to instability. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
374 J5B J5B_ACUTE_EPISODE (J5B) Resident Experiencing Episode of Recurrent/Chronic Problem CHAR 1 Health conditions: stability of conditions - resident experiencing acute
